identity.variant: Basic / Standard / Customized; hand configuration changes total DoF
identity.notes: Booster公式T1製品ページ、RoboCupソリューション、公式オープンソース、国内正規代理店契約を確認。Basic/Standard/Customizedとグリッパー・器用手の構成を分け、K1や後発T2の値を流用していない。

positioningFacts.statement: Made for Developers; lightweight, flexible and durable; 2025 RoboCup AdultSize champion model
Booster T1 is positioned for competition, research and development, with 50+ robotics teams and research institutes cited by the manufacturer
Official RoboCup solution provides Booster Gym, RoboCup Demo, Booster Train, Booster Deploy and Booster Assets for robot-soccer development

mobility.rawValue: humanoid robot; RoboCup AdultSize bipedal platform
mobility.evidenceSummary: 二足ヒューマノイド競技プラットフォームとして掲載。

heightCm.condition: 118cm is the official approximate standing height; dimensions are retained as raw value because page lists a three-axis dimension
heightCm.evidenceSummary: 公式概要の約1.2mと仕様表の118×47×23cmを確認。カード値は概要の約1.2mを118cmとして記録し、23cmを身長へ読み替えていない。

speedMps.rawValue: T1 product and RoboCup pages reviewed; no numeric maximum or normal locomotion speed published
speedMps.condition: do not infer speed from RoboCup performance
speedMps.evidenceSummary: 速度の公式数値は確認できない。

dof.rawValue: Basic/Standard: total 23 DoFs; Customized with gripper: total 31; Customized with dexterous hand: total 41
dof.variant: T1 Basic / Standard / Customized and hand configuration
dof.condition: total DoF is configuration-dependent; no single generic T1 value selected
dof.evidenceSummary: 公式仕様表が通常構成23、グリッパー付き31、器用手付き41を別欄で記載。

payloadKg.rawValue: No payload value published on reviewed T1 product, RoboCup or support pages; actuator peak torque is not a payload rating
payloadKg.condition: payload is not inferred from 130N·m actuator torque
payloadKg.evidenceSummary: 荷重値は確認できない。

runtimeMin.condition: card value is walking runtime; standing runtime retained in rawValue
runtimeMin.evidenceSummary: 歩行と立位を区別して記録。

batteryCapacityWh.condition: amp-hour capacity is published but nominal battery voltage is not, so Wh conversion is not performed
batteryCapacityWh.evidenceSummary: 10.5Ahは確認できるが、Whへ換算する電圧が公式にない。

chargeTimeMin.rawValue: Full-charge time not published on reviewed official T1 pages
chargeTimeMin.condition: runtime is not treated as charge time
chargeTimeMin.evidenceSummary: 充電時間は確認できない。

batterySystem.rawValue: Battery: 10.5Ah; chemistry, removable/hot-swap method and nominal voltage not stated
batterySystem.condition: only the directly published battery entry is normalized
batterySystem.evidenceSummary: 電池方式の存在と容量は確認できるが、化学系・交換方式は非公開。

controlMethod.rawValue: No T1-specific controller or teleoperation method named on reviewed product/specification pages
controlMethod.condition: generic education page control wording is not assigned to T1 without model-specific scope
controlMethod.evidenceSummary: T1固有の操作方式は確認できない。

sdk.rawValue: Comprehensive API interfaces, open-source framework/tools; Booster Gym, RoboCup Demo, Booster Train and Booster Deploy; official Booster Gym README describes deployment through Booster Robotics SDK and T1 support
sdk.normalizedValue: Booster Robotics SDK / Booster Gym / Booster Train / Booster Deploy / RoboCup Demo
sdk.condition: developer stack, not a single versioned SDK release
sdk.evidenceSummary: T1対応の公式GymとSDK経由の実機デプロイ手順を確認。

computePlatform.rawValue: Basic: NVIDIA AGX Orin, 200 TOPS; Standard/Customized: Intel i7-1370P CPU plus NVIDIA AGX Orin, 200 TOPS GPU
computePlatform.condition: platform differs by package; no single compute platform selected for generic T1
computePlatform.evidenceSummary: 公式仕様表の構成別CPU/GPUを保持。

ipRating.rawValue: No IP ingress-protection rating found on reviewed T1 pages
ipRating.condition: durability wording is not an IP rating
ipRating.evidenceSummary: 防塵防水等級は確認できない。

operatingTemperature.rawValue: No operating-temperature range found on reviewed T1 product, support or service pages
operatingTemperature.condition: no temperature value inferred from warranty/service terms
operatingTemperature.evidenceSummary: 動作温度は確認できない。

safetyStandard.rawValue: Service terms contain use and safety instructions but no named T1 safety standard or certification number
safetyStandard.condition: operational safety instructions are not recorded as a standard
safetyStandard.evidenceSummary: 安全上の注意は確認したが、規格番号は確認できない。

officialUseCases.reason: 製品ページがT1を競技・研究・開発向けに位置付けているため。

officialUseCases.officialExpression: Comprehensive API Interfaces + Open-Source Framework + Open-Source Tools for Streamlined Development
officialUseCases.reason: 開発者向けAPIとオープンソース開発基盤を明示しているため。

useCaseGaps: USE_CASE_GAP booster-t1 "RoboCup AdultSize robot soccer competition" https://www.booster.tech/robocup/
USE_CASE_GAP booster-t1 "embodied AI education / robotics soccer training courses" https://www.booster.tech/cn/education/

usageExamples.title: Robot Table Tennis - Purdue University
usageExamples.summary: Boosterが掲載する顧客事例タイトル。Purdue UniversityでT1を用いたロボット卓球の研究・実演を行った事例。

usageExamples.title: Building Robot Fighting Game - Frodobots
usageExamples.summary: Boosterが掲載する顧客事例タイトル。FrodobotsがT1を使ったロボット格闘ゲームを構築した事例。

usageExamples.title: FALCON RL Framework - Carnegie Mellon University
usageExamples.summary: Boosterが掲載する顧客事例タイトル。Carnegie Mellon UniversityのFALCON強化学習フレームワーク事例。

marketAvailability.rawValue: Official T1 page has Buy Now links, while the manufacturer store is an inquiry form; no public T1 price
marketAvailability.evidenceSummary: メーカーの購入導線と問い合わせ窓口はあるが、公開価格は確認できない。

japanAvailability.rawValue: Tohasen Robotics announced a Japan domestic authorized-distributor agreement with Booster Robotics on 2025-11-03
japanAvailability.evidenceSummary: 国内正規代理店契約を公式発表で確認。

distributorJapan.rawValue: Tohasen Robotics Co., Ltd. — Japan domestic authorized distributor
distributorJapan.evidenceSummary: 代理店自身の契約発表と会社概要の双方でBooster Robotics正規代理店表記を確認。

supportNote.rawValue: Booster publishes technical support/service terms; Tohasen announced a Japanese support system planned for the first half of 2026, but T1-specific SLA, repair lead time and current Japanese support scope are not published
supportNote.evidenceSummary: 正規代理店とサポート計画は確認したが、現行の具体条件は未確認。

sourceCandidates.reason: T1 store route is an inquiry form with no public amount; no price offer was created.

conflicts: T1 total DoF is 23 for Basic/Standard, 31 with gripper and 41 with dexterous hand; generic robot record cannot select one without a target package.
T1 publishes 10.5Ah but not nominal voltage, so battery capacity cannot be normalized to Wh.
humanReviewRequired: Select T1 Basic, Standard or Customized/hand configuration before publishing a single DoF and compute-platform value.
Confirm current T1 public price, Japanese quotation, battery voltage and load rating with the authorized sales channel if the detail page requires them.

identity.notes: Booster公式K1製品ページ、RoboCup・教育ソリューション、公式Gym README、国内正規代理店契約を確認。Geek/Education/Professionalで電池・算力・保証が異なる。

positioningFacts.statement: Introductory Embodied Development Platform and top choice for embodied-AI development
Officially positioned for embodied AI education and 2025 RoboCup KidSize competition
Official education solution covers graphical programming, Python/ROS2, simulation, RL and Sim2Real/real-robot verification

mobility.rawValue: humanoid robot; RoboCup KidSize bipedal platform
mobility.evidenceSummary: 二足ヒューマノイド競技・開発プラットフォームとして掲載。

speedMps.rawValue: No numeric maximum or normal locomotion speed published on reviewed K1 product, RoboCup or education pages
speedMps.condition: 0.4m/s is the runtime test condition, not a published maximum speed
speedMps.evidenceSummary: 仕様の0.4m/sは稼働時間の条件であり、速度値として採用していない。

dof.rawValue: Total DoFs: 22; per leg 6, per arm 4, head 2
dof.evidenceSummary: 全身22 DoFとscope別内訳を確認。

payloadKg.rawValue: No payload value published on reviewed K1 product, RoboCup or support pages; 60N·m peak torque is not a payload rating
payloadKg.condition: payload is not inferred from actuator torque or competition results
payloadKg.evidenceSummary: 荷重値は確認できない。

runtimeMin.condition: runtime differs by package; no single generic K1 card value selected
runtimeMin.evidenceSummary: 構成別の30分/80分を保持。立位時間はなく、歩行条件0.4m/sを記録。

batteryCapacityWh.condition: amp-hour values are published but nominal voltage is not, so Wh conversion is not performed
batteryCapacityWh.evidenceSummary: 構成別Ahは確認できるが、Wh換算に必要な電圧がない。

chargeTimeMin.rawValue: Full-charge time not published on reviewed official K1 pages
chargeTimeMin.condition: runtime is not treated as charge time
chargeTimeMin.evidenceSummary: 充電時間は確認できない。

batterySystem.rawValue: Battery: 2Ah (Geek) or 5Ah (Education/Professional); chemistry, voltage and swap method not stated
batterySystem.condition: only directly published battery entries normalized
batterySystem.evidenceSummary: 構成別バッテリー容量は確認できるが、化学系・交換方式は非公開。

controlMethod.rawValue: Official education solution describes mode switching, remote control and App basic control; page does not bind the control stack to one K1 package
controlMethod.evidenceSummary: 遠隔・App操作の記述はあるが、K1の個別パッケージとの対応が不明。

sdk.rawValue: Secondary development supported; Booster Gym official README now supports K1; Booster Train/Deploy/RoboCup Demo and ROS/Python education materials are public
sdk.normalizedValue: Booster Robotics SDK / Booster Gym / Booster Train / Booster Deploy / RoboCup Demo
sdk.condition: developer stack, not a single versioned SDK release
sdk.evidenceSummary: 公式K1対応RLフレームワークと二次開発対応を確認。

computePlatform.rawValue: Geek: 48 TOPS dense GPU; Education: 117 TOPS GPU; Professional: 200 TOPS GPU; board/model names not published
computePlatform.condition: AI performance differs by package and is not a named compute platform
computePlatform.evidenceSummary: 構成別TOPSは確認できるが、搭載ボード名は確認できない。

ipRating.rawValue: No IP ingress-protection rating found on reviewed K1 pages
ipRating.condition: durability/anti-fall wording is not an IP rating
ipRating.evidenceSummary: 防塵防水等級は確認できない。

operatingTemperature.rawValue: No operating-temperature range found on reviewed K1 product, support or service pages
operatingTemperature.condition: no temperature value inferred from warranty/service terms
operatingTemperature.evidenceSummary: 動作温度は確認できない。

safetyStandard.rawValue: Education/service pages mention safety rules and risk control but no named K1 safety standard or certification number
safetyStandard.condition: safety instructions are not recorded as a standard
safetyStandard.evidenceSummary: 教育ページの安全設計・安全規範は確認したが、規格番号は確認できない。

priceOffers.variant: K1 from-price; Geek/Education/Professional configuration not specified
K1 from-price; Geek/Education/Professional configuration not specified

officialUseCases.officialExpression: Introductory Embodied Development Platform / embodied development
officialUseCases.reason: K1を具身開発の入門プラットフォームとして位置付け、二次開発を明示しているため。

USE_CASE_GAP booster-k1 "RoboCup KidSize robot soccer competition" https://www.booster.tech/robocup/

usageExamples.title: "World Cup 'KidSize' Category Champion" - HTWK Team, Germany
usageExamples.summary: Boosterが掲載する顧客事例タイトル。HTWK Team（ドイツ）がK1でRoboCup 2025 KidSize部門のチャンピオンになった事例。

usageExamples.title: 2025 World Humanoid Robotics Games Federation Center Stage Lead Performer
usageExamples.summary: Boosterが掲載するK1の公式活用例。2025 World Humanoid Robotics Games Federationのセンターステージでリードパフォーマーを務めた事例。

marketAvailability.rawValue: Manufacturer product page publishes from-prices and Buy Now links for Geek/Education/Professional packages; exact package price is not separated
marketAvailability.evidenceSummary: メーカー公式ページで公開価格と購入導線を確認。

japanAvailability.rawValue: Tohasen Robotics announced a Japan domestic authorized-distributor agreement with Booster Robotics on 2025-11-03
japanAvailability.evidenceSummary: 国内正規代理店契約を公式発表で確認。

distributorJapan.rawValue: Tohasen Robotics Co., Ltd. — Japan domestic authorized distributor
distributorJapan.evidenceSummary: 代理店自身の契約発表でBooster Robotics正規代理店表記を確認。

supportNote.rawValue: Booster publishes technical support/service terms; Tohasen company profile identifies it as a Japan domestic authorized distributor; T1/K1 package-specific SLA, repair lead time and current Japanese support scope are not published
supportNote.evidenceSummary: 正規代理店表記は確認したが、K1の現行サポート条件は未確認。

sourceCandidates.reason: Chinese official page publishes 3.99万起; exact package/税区分 is not stated.

conflicts: K1 runtime and battery differ by Geek/Education/Professional package: 30min/2Ah versus 80min/5Ah.
K1 compute performance differs by package (48 dense/117/200 TOPS) and the official page does not name the compute boards.
English and Chinese official pages publish equivalent from-prices in USD and CNY, but the underlying package and tax treatment are not specified.
humanReviewRequired: Select K1 Geek, Education or Professional before publishing one runtime, battery capacity or compute-platform value.
Confirm whether the Japanese authorized channel offers the same public-price packages and the current Japan tax/support terms.
